# STARTER_TYPE_SYSTEM_RECOMMENDATION

Use this starter for **Type System Recommendation**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/lite_routes/rt_type_system_recommendation.md`
- `dist/lite_contracts/type_system_recommendation.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/type-system-expert.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/accessibility-feedback-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/graphic-design-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/ui-system-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Use when the job is to define a repeatable type system instead of suggest a single font.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~1678 words / ~2232 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_UI.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for Type System Recommendation. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
